raw_response: {"simulated_user_message":"I guess it’s the idea that if I slip up—if Dad misses a dose or I can’t give my partner the support he needs—everything falls apart. I keep seeing myself as that flawless version I made up and the moment I fall short, I’m already failing. It feels like a constant check‑list I never get to finish, and that pressure just keeps building.","problems_referred":["perfectionism","caregiver_stress"]}

parsed.simulated_user_message: I guess it’s the idea that if I slip up—if Dad misses a dose or I can’t give my partner the support he needs—everything falls apart. I keep seeing myself as that flawless version I made up and the moment I fall short, I’m already failing. It feels like a constant check‑list I never get to finish, and that pressure just keeps building.
